creator: sanja@bougakov.com
text:
Some additional info about notebook's hardware:

Model is Mitac 5033 (early revision, newer models used AMD CPU)
Memory: 32Mb EDO onboard plus 64Mb EDO upgrade
Chipset is Intel 430TX
Processor is Intel Pentium I  MMX 233 Mhz
Video card chipset is Trident 9385

Some additional info about this notebook is here: 
http://www.orphanlaptops.com/5033.htm or here: 
http://www.orphanlaptops.com/5033.htm
